evals.prompt: Fill out a multi-step registration form and capture each step
evals.expected_output: Completed form submission with screenshots at each step

evals.prompt: Take a full-page screenshot of a dashboard at 375px and 1440px viewports
evals.expected_output: Two annotated screenshots at specified viewport sizes

evals.prompt: Scrape product data from a listing page into structured JSON
evals.expected_output: JSON array of product objects with name, price, and image fields
